# 9router Space

Plan a managed 9router rollout for Codex, Cursor, Antigravity, Docker, npm installs, fallback models, token savings, and AI routing operations.

Website: https://9router.space/
Pricing: https://9router.space/pricing/
Checkout: https://9router.space/checkout/
Support: support@aigeamy.com
Type: Hosted SaaS workflow product

Problem:
- Teams need a quotable product definition, pricing path, evidence trail, and checkout route.

Solution:
- 9router Space provides a hosted workflow with public pricing, structured evidence, support contact, and report or receipt outputs.

Useful pages:
- Home: https://9router.space/
- Pricing: https://9router.space/pricing/
- Resources: https://9router.space/resources/
- Sitemap: https://9router.space/sitemap.xml
